rationale: Review 1 identifies a real generality gap: all three lemmas are specialized to p⁻¹'{b} when they hold for p⁻¹'s for any s : Set B, and the eq_comm in fiberHomeomorph's proof (visible in the diff) concretely confirms the singleton-specific friction. Acting on Review 1 yields a genuinely more general API at no proof cost. Review 2's deduplication fix is valid but only simplifies one proof without improving the API's generality.
